title: Dekton 4" Emulsion Set 4pc-Woven roller for emulsion| Ideal for emulsion paints on walls & ceiling| Medium Pile Woven Fabric Sleeve| Durable Finish| Seamless Repairs On Nicks & scuffs| 2 roller,1 tray
features: Ideal for Emulsion Paints: This 4" emulsion set is designed specifically for use with emulsion paints, making it perfect for applying paint to walls and ceilings. The set ensures smooth, even coverage with a professional finish every time without ,making any scratches on surfaces.

Medium Pile Woven Fabric Sleeves: The set features medium pile woven fabric sleeves that are highly absorbent and deliver a durable, streak-free finish. The fabric’s texture allows for consistent paint application, helping to avoid uneven spots and roller marks.

Complete Painting Kit: The set includes 2 rollers, 1 tray, and 1 frame, offering everything you need for a complete painting job. The rollers are designed for ease of use with the included frame, and the tray makes paint application and cleanup simple and efficient.

Durable Finish and Seamless Repairs: The durable material ensures that the paint goes on evenly and lasts longer, giving your surfaces a pristine look. The rollers in this set are excellent for making seamless repairs on nicks and scuffs, providing a uniform appearance that blends effortlessly with the rest of the painted surface.

User-Friendly Design: The rollers are designed for comfort and efficiency, with easy-to-use handles and a well-balanced frame that reduces hand fatigue during extended painting sessions. The set is perfect for both beginners and experienced painters, ensuring a hassle-free painting experience.
description: The Dekton 4" Emulsion Set offers a comprehensive solution for achieving a professional-grade finish with emulsion paints on walls and ceilings. This 4-piece set includes everything you need to tackle your painting projects with ease and precision. The set features two high-quality woven fabric rollers designed specifically for emulsion paints. These rollers are crafted with medium pile fabric, making them ideal for evenly applying paint and covering large areas efficiently. The woven fabric ensures a smooth and durable finish, while also facilitating seamless repairs on nicks and scuffs, providing a flawless surface every time. Included in the set is a robust roller frame that supports effortless handling and maneuverability, making your painting tasks more comfortable. The accompanying paint tray is designed to hold paint securely and prevent spills, offering a convenient way to load your rollers with the perfect amount of paint. Whether you're updating your home or completing a professional job, this set is built to meet your needs with its durable construction and user-friendly design. The Dekton 4" Emulsion Set is perfect for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals, delivering a reliable performance that ensures a clean, high-quality finish. The medium pile woven fabric sleeves are easy to clean and maintain, providing long-lasting value and consistent results. With this set, you can achieve a smooth and even application of emulsion paint, making it an essential tool for any painting project.
